items.title: Bain sees US$100 billion SaaS market in agentic AI automation
items.summary: Bain & Company has estimated a US$100 billion market in the US for SaaS companies using agentic AI. The firm said the market is tied to automating coordination work in enterprise systems. The estimate comes from the second report in...
